text: Last survey of the season was the Aug 6 Titlow run, so field work is officially wrapped. Huge thanks all.
Bittersweet! Site 7 (Salt Creek) data is fully logged now too. On to analysis.
Nice work Alex. I'll move the last coolers back to the gear closet.
Reminder: -80 freezer maintenance Thursday AM. Move time-sensitive samples to the backup by Wed EOD.
On it - moving my Site 1-4 racks tomorrow afternoon, labeling them.
Anyone hit convergence warnings fitting a GLMM with site as random effect? lme4 is complaining on the diversity model.
Try scaling your continuous predictors first, and bump the optimizer iterations. Usually clears it.
Scaling did it, thank you both. Estimates barely moved but the warning is gone.
Alex - when the warming-anomaly figure is ready I'd like to see it. Might help frame the discussion.
Will share once the v4 figure is final (this week). Adding the 2025 baseline as a dashed line.
This week: the Menge & Sutherland disturbance paper. PDF in the drive. Thoughts before Monday?
Perfect timing - I'm literally citing it in my methods. Happy to lead the framing if useful.
We're down to two pairs of waders in size 8. Order more before next term?
Added to the quarterly order. Also getting a case of 50mL tubes Alex flagged.
Reminder: department research seminar slots are filling. Alex, you're confirmed for Dec 9.
Confirmed, thanks! 15-minute thesis-progress talk. Slides in progress.
Gumboot chiton the size of my shoe at Titlow this weekend. Obsessed.
I will never not be excited about a good chiton. Post the photo!
The lab cold brew situation has gotten dangerously good btw. Whoever started it, thank you.
Sound Shores newsletter goes out next week. Alex, can you draft the tide-pool ethics blurb?
Sure - I'll draft something short and gentle and drop it here for review before anything sends.
